basic_details.job_title: RITES Individual Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Rail India Technical and Economic Service (RITES)
basic_details.short_information: Rail India Technical and Economic Service (RITES) Individual Consultant Notification 2026 has been released on 29 June 2026 on the official website rites.com. A total of 8 vacancies have been announced through the RITES Individual Consultant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 62 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in Civil Engineering, PG Degree in Civil Engineering with specialization in Environmental Engineering / Public Health Engineering or equivalent
qualification.details: Individual Consultant: Senior Quality cum Material Engineer: Degree in Civil Engineering. Preferable - PG Degree in Civil Engineering with specialization in Environmental Engineering / Public Health Engineering or equivalent. Individual Consultant: QA/QC Expert: Degree in Civil Engineering. Preferred: PG in Civil Engineering with specialization in Environmental Engineering / Public Health Engineering or equivalent.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Individual Consultant: Senior Quality cum Material Engineer

post_wise_breakdown.post_name: Individual Consultant: Senior Quality cum Material Engineer

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the RITES Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 13-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of RITES to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.rail_india_technical_and_economic_servic: Degree in Civil Engineering, PG Degree in Civil Engineering with specialization in Environmental Engineering / Public Health Engineering or equivalent

content_sections.heading: RITES Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the RITES Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download RITES Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.post_name: Individual Consultant: Senior Quality cum Material Engineer

rows.event: Commencement of submission of online application
Last date of submission of online application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the RITES Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 13-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of RITES to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for RITES Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting the online application for RITES Recruitment 2026 is 13th July 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies released by RITES?
faq.answer: RITES has released a total of 8 vacancies for the post of Individual Consultant. These vacancies are distributed among different specialized roles within the consultant category.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Individual Consultant posts?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification is a Degree in Civil Engineering. A PG Degree in Civil Engineering with specialization in Environmental Engineering or Public Health Engineering is preferable for some roles.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the RITES Individual Consultant recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Individual Consultant posts is 62 years. There is no minimum age limit specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the RITES Individual Consultant positions?
faq.answer: The salary offered ranges from Rs. 85,000 to Rs. 1,00,000 per month, depending on the specific post and experience of the selected candidate.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for RITES Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for RITES Individual Consultant posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves two main stages: Document Scrutiny and an Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on the scrutiny of their submitted documents.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for RITES Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for RITES Recruitment 2026 is entirely online. Candidates need to visit the official website or use the provided link to submit their applications.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these RITES Individual Consultant positions?
faq.answer: The positions are contractual in nature. Selected candidates will be appointed on a contract basis for the duration specified by RITES.

faq.question: Q10. Where will the interview for RITES Recruitment 2026 be conducted?
faq.answer: The Document Scrutiny and Interview will be conducted in Gurugram, Ahmedabad, or Online. Candidates should be prepared for any of these modes.
